title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Queen, Unknown person #5, Kawamatsu, Unknown person #6, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #7 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Lord Queen loves building things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: His hobbies include building weapons and viruses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wagh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's it! Hold him down, you fools! Did you think the prisoners would side with you, straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've long since crushed these poor saps' dreams of rebellion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! If I just tell these guys everything, they're sure to change their minds!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Where are you aiming that! You'll never hit him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only have to hit one of you. It'll spread to the rest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KAAAA AAAPA! Pappapa Prappa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oi! Tell them, young straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that they still have hope! That they have one more chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's right! There's supposed to be someone-

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Huh? Kappa?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't tell me-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head jailer! A voice... from inside the sealed cell?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that cage held some fearsome beast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell could have stayed locked up in there for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were told to give him fish that had drank the runoff from the factory.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was Kaido's plan, to execute him. Thirteen years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just go finish him off! We can write it off as an accidental death!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The man inside there

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is one of the nine Red Sheaths!

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: KAPPA- PPAPA! Release me from these cuffs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huuuuh?! I thought they were all dead!

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: I knew it! It really is Kawamatsu!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Good! His cuffs still aren't off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll take his head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is my chance for a come- up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, I'm takin' the glory for this one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kawa- Matsu!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Ah! Kiku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There he is! The dirty little pipsqueak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're that weirdo that loves poisonous fish, eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: You're no legendary Samurai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll take that head of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Glimt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The INVADER'S run off!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: It's that Ninja from yesterday! Get him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: NIN NIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ) a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Owwww!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Needles?! No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: These are fish bones! Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kawamatsu! The key to your cuffs, and your blade!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Owagh!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Just in time,

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: RAIZO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's been too long,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My beloved blade, "Sotomuso"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let me ask you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you men like Sumo?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
